sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cenovus Plans Major Turnaround at Lima, Ohio, Refinery in Second Half -- OPIS
feed.summary: Cenovus Energy is planning a major turnaround at its 185,000 b/d Lima, Ohio, refinery during the second half of the year, which is expected to reduce annualized throughput by 20,000 b/d to 24,000 b/d. The company's overall maintenance schedule will impact U.S. refining throughputs by 35,000-45,000 b/d in Q3 and 40,000-50,000 b/d in Q4. This follows the successful completion of a 59-day turnaround at its Toledo refinery ahead of schedule in Q1.

feed.title: W.R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) Major Shareholder Buys $24,374,250.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Major shareholder Sumitomo Insurance Co Mitsui recently purchased 345,000 shares of W.R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) for over $24 million, increasing its stake by 0.60% to total 57,508,038 shares. The transaction, disclosed on February 19th, pushed the company's shares up by 1.1% to $71.08. W.R. Berkley reported Q4 EPS of $1.13 and revenue of $3.18 billion, while analysts maintain a "Hold" rating with an average target price of $69.67.

feed.title: AeroVironment (NASDAQ:AVAV) Director Sells $68,750.00 in Stock
feed.summary: AeroVironment Director Stephen Page sold 250 shares of the company's stock for $68,750, reducing his total holdings by 0.50% to 50,251 shares valued at approximately $13.82 million. Following this transaction, AeroVironment's stock traded down 6.0% to $264.63 with a market capitalization of $13.21 billion. The company recently missed quarterly EPS estimates but exceeded revenue expectations, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $367.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead the Corcept Class Action Lawsuit – RGRD Law
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Corcept Therapeutics Incorporated (NASDAQ: CORT) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between October 31, 2024, and December 30, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Corcept misrepresented the likelihood of FDA approval for its lead product candidate, relacorilant, concealing repeated FDA concerns about the adequacy of clinical evidence. After the FDA issued a Complete Response Letter detailing these concerns, Corcept's stock price dropped by more than 50%.

feed.title: Energy Income Partners, LLC Reduces Stake in Westlake Chemical P
feed.summary: Energy Income Partners, LLC has reduced its stake in Westlake Chemical Partners LP by 11.94%, selling 212,108 shares at $19 each. Despite the reduction, the stock has since gained 11.63%. This move is part of the firm's strategy to optimize its energy sector portfolio, focusing on MLPs and YieldCos for its high net worth clients.

feed.title: Hillhouse Capital Management, Ltd. Reduces Stake in Webull Corp
feed.summary: Hillhouse Capital Management, Ltd. significantly reduced its stake in Webull Corp by selling over 27 million shares at $7.77 each on December 31, 2025. This move decreases Hillhouse's holdings in the digital investment platform by 81.94%, reflecting a strategic portfolio adjustment. Webull Corp, which went public in April 2025, currently trades at $5.91 and faces challenges with poor future performance potential according to its GF Score and financial metrics.

feed.title: USA Compression Partners LP Announces 2025 K-1 Tax Package Availability
feed.summary: USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) has announced that its 2025 K-1 tax packages are now available online at taxpackagesupport.com/usac and are also being mailed to unitholders. Unitholders can also contact Tax Package Support or visit the company's website for assistance. USA Compression is a leading independent provider of natural gas compression services, focusing on midstream applications.

feed.title: CDT Equity acquires 20% stake in Sarborg for $115 million By Investing.com
feed.summary: CDT Equity Inc. announced it is acquiring a 20% equity stake in Sarborg Limited for $115 million. Sarborg operates an artificial intelligence business specializing in signature intelligence analysis. Despite CDT's current market capitalization of $2.14 million and its stock trading near a 52-week low, the company views this acquisition as a strengthening of its existing collaboration with Sarborg, whose technology is complementary to CDT's biopharmaceutical development focus.

feed.title: Linde (LIN) Gets Price Target Increase from BMO Capital Ahead of 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst John McNulty has raised his price target for Linde plc (LIN) to $507 from $501, maintaining an Outperform rating. This adjustment comes as Linde enters 2026 with a robust project backlog and sustained pricing power, which are expected to counteract macroeconomic challenges and slower project ramps. Despite an "uneven" economic environment, Linde reported record annual EPS, operating cash flow, and operating margins in Q4 2025, alongside a record $10 billion project backlog.

feed.title: CVR Energy Inc. (NYSE:CVI) Declares $0.37 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: CVR Energy Inc. (NYSE:CVI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on March 9th to shareholders of record on March 2nd, resulting in an indicated yield of approximately 7.2%. Despite this, the dividend appears unsustainable given the company's 679.7% payout ratio and reliance on its balance sheet for payments, with analysts forecasting a projected payout ratio of roughly 623% for next year. The company recently reported a quarterly EPS of ($0.80) on revenue of $1.81 billion, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Strong Sell" with an average price target of $29.25.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty Ltd. (NYSE:AGO) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.38
feed.summary: Assured Guaranty Ltd. (NYSE:AGO) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share, marking an 11.8% increase from its previous dividend. This dividend will be payable on March 20th to shareholders of record on March 6th, with an ex-dividend date of March 6th. The company maintains a healthy payout ratio of 19.2%, with analysts projecting a future payout ratio of 20.9%, indicating strong coverage of its dividend.

feed.title: RCI Hospitality receives Nasdaq noncompliance notice on filings
feed.summary: RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. (RICK) has received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq due to its failure to timely file its Form 10-Q and Form 10-K with the SEC. The company has until March 31, 2026, to file the reports or submit a compliance plan, with a potential extension to June 29, 2026. This notice comes amidst a period of leadership transitions and a slight decrease in sales for the fiscal first quarter of 2026, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued.

feed.title: SEC Charges ADM and Three Former Executives with Accounting and Disclosure Fraud
feed.summary: The SEC has charged Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) and three former executives with accounting and disclosure fraud, alleging they inflated earnings and manipulated financial statements. This action highlights concerns about corporate governance and the importance of ethical practices, leading to a decline in ADM's stock price and heightening regulatory scrutiny within the industry. The case serves as a powerful reminder for companies to maintain rigorous ethical standards and transparency to prevent financial misconduct and restore investor trust.

feed.title: Sibanye Stillwater Stock Sinks Again: Bargain Gold Play or Value Trap for US Investors?
feed.summary: Sibanye Stillwater's stock has heavily underperformed despite strong gold prices, primarily due to struggles in the platinum group metals (PGM) market, rising costs, and labor risks. While it trades at a significant discount to its net asset value, US investors face high risk, betting on PGM recovery, successful restructuring, and stable South African operations. The company's dividend is also less reliable, making it a speculative play for those comfortable with high volatility and emerging market risks.

feed.title: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP Acquires Additional Shares in Tenax Therapeu
feed.summary: RTW INVESTMENTS, LP increased its stake in Tenax Therapeutics Inc. by acquiring an additional 272,622 shares on December 31, 2025, bringing its total holdings to 650,968 shares. This strategic move, valued at $12.19 per share, reflects RTW's confidence in the specialty pharmaceutical company despite its current financial challenges. Tenax Therapeutics Inc. focuses on cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases and is advancing clinical trials for levosimendan, aligning with RTW INVESTMENTS, LP's healthcare-focused investment strategy.

feed.title: Blackstone's (BX) Perpetual Private Equity Strategy Fund To Acquire Champions Group
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. (BX) announced that its perpetual private equity strategy fund has entered into an agreement to acquire Champions Group, a prominent home services company. This acquisition, expected to close in the first half of 2026, aligns with Blackstone's strategy to expand into a multi-service powerhouse and build platforms in fragmented industries like home services. Champions Group offers essential residential services with over 1,800 field technicians and 150,000 active members.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) General Counsel Sells $111,048.96 in Stock
feed.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics General Counsel, James Kasinger, sold 2,112 shares of the company's stock for $111,048.96, reducing his stake by 2.42%. This sale followed the company's quarterly earnings report, which showed a significant miss with EPS of ($1.37) against an estimated ($1.15) and revenues down 97.8% year-over-year. Analysts currently have an average target price of $64.24 for CRSP, with a mixed rating of Buy, Hold, and Sell recommendations.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Insider Vicente Reynal Sells 900 Shares

This latest transaction is part of a series of insider sales by Reynal and other senior executives in February, which MarketBeat identifies as a key factor in recent downward pressure on the stock despite strong Q4 earnings and positive FY2026 guidance. The company also announced a quarterly dividend and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of $101.86.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (NASDAQ:CRSP) CEO Sells $366,324.86 in Stock
feed.summary: CRISPR Therapeutics CEO Samarth Kulkarni recently sold 6,967 shares for $366,324.86, adding to previous sales in January totaling roughly $5.53 million in CRSP stock, reducing his stake by 2.99%. This comes after the company reported a significant earnings and revenue miss, though institutional ownership is high and analyst ratings average a "Hold" with a $64.24 price target. The company specializes in gene-editing therapies for serious diseases, with its lead program CTX001 for sickle cell disease.

feed.title: DXP Enterprises to Announce Q4 and FY 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: DXP Enterprises plans to release its financial results for Q4 and FY 2025 after market close on February 25, 2025. The company will host a conference call on February 26, 2025, at 10:30 AM Central Time, streamed live on its website for investors. The announcement reminds investors that forward-looking statements involve risks and uncertainties.

feed.title: Barclays Raises Illinois Tool Works (ITW) Price Target, Sees "Some Encouragement" in Outlook
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Julian Mitchell has raised his price target for Illinois Tool Works (ITW) to $275 from $244, while maintaining an Underweight rating. The adjustment follows the company's better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, driven by strong demand for automotive parts and strategies to mitigate tariff impacts. Despite "some encouragement" in the outlook, the analyst retains a cautious stance.

TD affirmed its "Buy" rating and BMO its "Outperform" rating, indicating continued analyst confidence in the company's prospects. This decision, reflecting improved cash flow or commodity upside expectations, led to modest intraday share price increases for CVE.

Institutional investors have made various adjustments to their holdings, with the company focusing on high-energy-density lithium-ion batteries using silicon anode technology.

feed.title: BigBear.ai (NYSE:BBAI) Stock Price Down 7.5% - What's Next?
feed.summary: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) experienced a 7.5% decline in its stock price on Friday, trading at $3.875 with a volume of approximately 39.15 million shares. feed.title: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) Trading Down 1.3% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) shares experienced a 1.3% decline on Friday, trading down to $658.1020 on lower-than-average volume. This occurred despite several analysts raising their price targets, though the company still holds a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $612.50. The aerospace company recently reported mixed quarterly results, missing EPS estimates but surpassing revenue expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend of $3.45 per share.

feed.title: ‘Consequences of poor planning’: Gallatin family still fighting after TVA pauses plan to run transmission line through their farm
feed.summary: An eighth-generation farming family in Gallatin, TN, along with country musician John Rich and a Sumner County Commissioner, continues to fight against the Tennessee Valley Authority's (TVA) proposed transmission line through their historic land, despite the TVA announcing a "pause" on the project. The family highlights the farm's cultural and educational value, including a farm school for children, which would be severely impacted. The TVA has stated its intention to form a "Landowner Task Force" to involve community voices and balance energy needs with property rights, though critics believe this pause may be a tactic to wait out public outcry.

feed.title: Is BlackLine Stock a Turnaround Bet After This Fund's New $20 Million Stake?
feed.summary: Potrero Capital Research recently established a new position in BlackLine (BL) by purchasing 370,557 shares valued at $20.49 million, making it one of the fund's top holdings. This significant investment signals a potential turnaround for BlackLine, which provides cloud-based software for accounting automation, despite its shares being down 27.6% over the past year. The company's recent financial performance, including expanding operating margins and growing remaining performance obligations, suggests it is not a shrinking vendor and could appeal to long-term investors.

feed.title: Balyasny Asset Management L.P. Increases Stake in Beyond Air Inc
feed.summary: Balyasny Asset Management L.P. has increased its stake in Beyond Air Inc (NASDAQ: XAIR) by adding 299,105 shares, bringing its total holdings to 763,266 shares. This transaction, executed on December 31, 2025, at $0.726 per share, signals the investment firm's interest in the medical device company despite Beyond Air Inc's current financial challenges and "possible value trap" GF Value. The investment firm holds a significant equity portfolio and focuses on diverse strategies to maximize returns.

feed.title: Hood River Capital Management LLC Reduces Stake in Comstock Inc

Comstock Inc, trading at $3.15, has a GF Value of $3.47 and focuses on converting natural resources into renewable fuels and metals, but faces financial challenges including negative profitability metrics.

feed.summary: RAFFLES ASSOCIATES LP reduced its stake in Provident Financial Holdings Inc by 552 shares on December 31, 2025, a 0.14% change, to 391,239 shares, now comprising 5.8% of its portfolio. The transaction occurred at $15.91 per share. feed.title: Insider Sell: Sweetnam Jordan Douglas Bradley Sells 1,009 Shares of eBay Inc (EBAY)
feed.summary: Sweetnam Jordan Douglas Bradley, Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer at eBay Inc (EBAY), sold 1,009 shares of the company on February 18, 2026. This transaction adds to a history of insider selling for eBay, with 41 insider sells and no buys over the past year. eBay Inc is currently deemed significantly overvalued based on its GF Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.21.

feed.title: Pentair Stock Is Quietly Becoming a Clean-Water Power Play
feed.summary: Pentair plc (PNR) is highlighted as a significant, yet often overlooked, player in the clean-water and climate-tech sector. The article suggests that while focus is often on AI, EVs, and crypto, substantial investment is flowing into water infrastructure, positioning Pentair as a key US-facing name in this shift. With strong North American exposure, a healthy balance sheet, and a focus on essential infrastructure like pool equipment and industrial filtration, Pentair offers a stable investment opportunity aligned with long-term trends in water scarcity and climate resilience.

feed.title: AXT Inc. Earnings Call Balances Growth And Risk
feed.summary: AXT Inc.'s recent Q4 earnings call revealed a mix of strong demand drivers and near-term challenges. The company reported a record indium phosphide backlog and growing demand from AI and data centers, supported by a significant cash raise for capacity expansion. However, AXT also faced lower Q4 revenue, continued losses, elevated inventory, and significant reliance on unpredictable China export permits to convert its backlog into revenue.

feed.title: Applied Digital (NASDAQ:APLD) Trading Down 7.9% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Applied Digital (NASDAQ: APLD) shares experienced a 7.9% drop in mid-day trading, closing at $29.04 with a volume below its daily average. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $37.00. While insiders have recently sold shares, institutional ownership has increased significantly, indicating mixed signals from different investor groups.

feed.title: Ashford Hospitality Trust completes $13.5 million sale of Embassy Suites Austin
feed.summary: Ashford Hospitality Trust (NYSE:AHT) has completed the sale of its Embassy Suites Austin hotel for $13.5 million in cash, as detailed in a recent SEC filing. The sale occurs with AHT shares trading near their 52-week low. This transaction is part of the company's broader strategy to explore strategic alternatives, terminate certain preferred stock offerings, and sell additional hotels to reduce debt.

feed.title: Dropbox Q4 2025 revenue hit by FormSwift as focus shifts to AI search tool Dash
feed.summary: Dropbox's Q4 2025 revenue was impacted by its document service FormSwift, which will be sunset by the end of 2026 as the company pivots to its AI search tool, Dash. Although FormSwift acted as a "modest headwind," Dropbox exceeded its overall revenue guidance. The company is actively integrating Dash into its core offerings and scaling its rollout to drive adoption, expecting full-year 2026 revenue between $2.485 billion and $2.5 billion.

feed.title: Kroger Selects McCann as New Creative Agency, Ending DDB Partnership
feed.summary: Kroger has appointed McCann as its new creative agency of record, replacing DDB New York after a six-year partnership. This move signifies a strategic shift in Kroger's marketing approach to enhance its brand and customer engagement in the competitive grocery market. McCann will develop creative campaigns under its "Truth Well Told" philosophy to drive business growth.

feed.title: Herbalife Stock Surges 18% After Earnings Beat. Here’s What Changed
feed.summary: Herbalife (HLF) stock surged 18.32% after reporting fourth-quarter results that surpassed expectations, with adjusted EPS of $0.45 and net sales up 6.3% to $1.3 billion. The positive investor sentiment was further fueled by Cristiano Ronaldo's $7.5 million strategic investment and 10% equity stake in Herbalife’s Pro2col™ technology, aligning with the company's expansion into personalized nutrition. Despite analyst price targets averaging $14.25 below the current share price and a leveraged balance sheet, investors are focusing on near-term earnings stability and strong operating profitability, with analysts forecasting a 19.5% forward EPS CAGR.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Andrew Harrison Sells 5,500 Shares of Alaska Air G
feed.summary: Andrew Harrison, Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer of Alaska Airlines, sold 5,500 shares of Alaska Air Group Inc (ALK) on February 18, 2026. This sale increases his total sales over the past year to 35,100 shares, with no purchases. The stock is currently trading at $56.63, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.91, suggesting it is modestly undervalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) Trading Up 1.2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) shares rose 1.2% to $49.24 on Friday with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $49.02. The company recently beat Q4 earnings estimates, issued strong FY2026 EPS guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend to $0.7075, resulting in a 5.7% yield. Notably, an EVP sold a portion of their holdings, while institutional investors have adjusted their stakes in Verizon.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) Stock Price Down 1.4% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) shares were down 1.4% in midday trading due to concerns about valuation and concentration in GLP-1/weight-loss drugs, leading to profit-taking. Despite this, the company reported positive long-term Phase 3 data for Omvoh, additional trial wins (Zepbound-Taltz), and a strong Q4 beat with raised FY2026 EPS guidance. Analysts have increased price targets, and Eli Lilly boosted its quarterly dividend, maintaining high institutional ownership.

feed.title: RR (Richtech Robotics NASDAQ) $2.78 20 Feb 2026 market closed: lawsuit clouds RR stock upside
feed.summary: Richtech Robotics (RR) closed at $2.78 on February 20, 2026, experiencing volatility due to legal issues, specifically a class-action lawsuit concerning a disputed Microsoft collaboration claim. Despite a "HOLD" rating from Meyka AI and a projected yearly price of $6.99, the stock faces significant risks from ongoing litigation, reputational damage, and negative operating margins. The company exhibits strong cash per share and a cash-heavy balance sheet, but weak revenue and profitability metrics currently weigh on its valuation.

feed.title: Misleading government publication causes confusion for investors over future of Musselwhite gold mine
feed.summary: A Canadian government publication incorrectly stated that the Shibogama First Nations Council was considering purchasing the Musselwhite gold mine, causing confusion for investors and owner Orla Mining Ltd. The publication has since been quietly updated after Orla Mining, which bought the mine in 2025, clarified it had no intention of selling. The First Nations council confirmed they had considered purchasing the mine in 2024 but decided not to proceed.

This transaction follows a pattern of 16 insider sells and no insider buys for WESCO International Inc over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $307.03, which is significantly above its GF Value of $191.93, indicating it is overvalued.

feed.title: ROSEN, LEADING TRIAL ATTORNEYS, Encourages Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. Investors to Secure ...
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Vistagen Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: VTGN) to secure legal counsel as a class action lawsuit has been filed. The firm is seeking to represent investors who purchased Vistagen common stock between April 1, 2022, and December 16, 2023, alleging that misleading statements regarding the company's drug development caused investor damages. Investors have until March 16, 2026, to move for lead plaintiff.

feed.title: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) Reaches New 52-Week High - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: First Bancorp (NASDAQ:FBNC) recently hit a new 52-week high of $62.64, closing at $62.27 with significant trading volume. Despite mixed analyst ratings, the consensus remains a "Moderate Buy" with a target price of $61.25. The company exceeded EPS expectations but missed on revenue, raised its quarterly dividend, and has seen recent insider selling.

feed.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Receives FDA Approval for BYSANTI™
feed.summary: Vanda Pharmaceuticals announced FDA approval for BYSANTI™ (milsaperidone) as a first-line therapy for acute episodes of bipolar I disorder and schizophrenia in adults. The drug is expected to be commercially available in Q3 2026 and comes with patent protection until 2044. BYSANTI™ is also undergoing further clinical study as an adjunctive treatment for treatment-resistant major depressive disorder.
